title: An Act to Revoke the Tax-exempt Status of an Organization That Fails to Report Sexual Assaults Committed by Employees, Board Members, Volunteers or Affiliates
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 28, 2025
last_house_action: 4/8/2025 - Committee on Taxation suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/28/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
